title: edithea sousae
intro: Edithea sousae, also known as American Germander, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of American Germander are attributed to its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. American Germander can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
